name: test-coverage
description: Improve test coverage for a module: analyze gaps, write tests, verify

parameters.name: module
parameters.description: Module or directory to improve coverage for

team.name: test-engineer
team.role: Test engineering specialist — writes thorough, maintainable tests

tasks.title: Analyze test coverage for {{module}}
tasks.description:
Analyze the current test coverage of {{module}}:
1. Identify which functions/branches/edge cases lack tests
2. Prioritize by risk (public API first, critical paths, error handling)
3. Check existing test patterns and conventions ({{framework}})
4. Write coverage-analysis.md with specific gaps and priorities

tasks.title: Write missing tests
tasks.description:
Based on coverage-analysis.md, write tests for {{module}} using {{framework}}:
- Follow existing test conventions and patterns
- Cover the highest-priority gaps first
- Include edge cases and error paths
- Tests should be readable and maintainable
- All tests (new and existing) must pass

expectations.criteria: New tests cover the identified gaps, follow project conventions, test meaningful behavior (not implementation details), and all pass
